subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! This is the age, and the hosts of victory are descending, wave upon wave, from the Abhá Kingdom without bound or limit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان یزدان عصر است و جنود نصر متتابع الورود از ملکوت ابهی بیحد و حصر این
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @effort; striving, @call to action
